strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in high-scale production environments
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Strong architectural and performance optimization skills demonstrated in roles like Optilyz (pricing optimization for millions of mails) and GISCollective (Kubernetes-deployed Geo-Data platform)
concerns: Lack of explicit Nest.js experience, a primary stack requirement, though TypeScript/Node.js proficiency is strong
No direct evidence of Vitest usage; testing experience mentioned is with Jest and other frameworks
Limited exposure to cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) beyond AWS CDK; containerization experience is present (Docker/Kubernetes)
response.justification: Bogdan has 7+ years of full-stack experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and demonstrates strong architectural and performance optimization skills in high-scale environments (e.g., Optilyz, re:cinq). His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure aligns well with emerging trends. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack requirement) and Vitest (testing framework), which are critical gaps. Cloud platform experience is mostly AWS CDK-focused, with limited broader cloud platform exposure.
